raw_text:
Vertex Analytics

Mid-Level Data Scientist

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA (Remote-

Friendly)

TYPE

Full-Time

COMPENSATION

$120,000 - $160,000 per year

TECH STACK

Python (Pandas, NumPy,
scikit-learn)

SQL

XGBoost

Jupyter Notebooks

Statistics & Experimental
Design

A/B Testing & Causal
Inference

Git / Version Control

Matplotlib / Seaborn (Data
Visualization)

Snowflake or BigQuery

scikit-learn & model
evaluation

About Vertex Analytics: Vertex Analytics is a fast-growing
data analytics and AI consulting firm that helps mid-market to
enterprise clients unlock actionable insights from their data.
Founded in 2019, we specialize in designing and implementing
end-to-end data science solutions, from exploratory analysis to

production machine learning systems. Our mission is to
democratize advanced analytics and empower organizations
to make smarter, faster decisions.

We are seeking a talented Mid-Level Data Scientist to join our
growing analytics team. You'll work on diverse client projects

spanning predictive modeling, A/B testing frameworks, and
statistical experimentation. In this role, you'll own end-to-end
data science workflows—from SQL-based data extraction to
model development and evaluation. You should have solid
fundamentals in statistics, machine learning, and
programming, with the ability to communicate findings to both
technical and non-technical stakeholders.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Design and implement machine learning pipelines using
Python (scikit-learn, XGBoost) to solve real-world business
problems across multiple client engagements

Extract, transform, and analyze large datasets using SQL
and Python (Pandas, NumPy) to identify patterns and drive
actionable recommendations

Develop and execute A/B testing frameworks and statistical
experiments; analyze results and present findings to clients
with clear business implications

Build and validate predictive models, performing feature
engineering, hyperparameter tuning, and cross-validation to
optimize model performance

Collaborate with data engineers and analytics engineers to
create reproducible, production-ready code and
documentation for client handoff

Mentor junior data analysts and interns on statistical best
practices, coding standards, and analytical methodologies

Communicate complex analytical findings and modeling
results to clients through presentations, dashboards, and
written reports

REQUIREMENTS

Transforming Business IntelligenceThrough Data-Driven Insights andAdvanced Analytics 2–5 years of professional experience in data science,
analytics, or machine learning roles

Strong proficiency in Python for data manipulation, analysis,

and modeling (Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn)

Solid understanding of statistics, hypothesis testing, and
experimental design; hands-on experience with A/B testing

Competency with SQL for data extraction, transformation,
and exploratory data analysis on structured databases

Experience building and evaluating machine learning
models (regression, classification, clustering) with
demonstrated knowledge of model validation techniques

BONUS POINTS

Familiarity with advanced ML libraries such as XGBoost,
LightGBM, or ensemble methods

Experience with statistical software or packages (e.g., R,
SciPy, statsmodels)

Exposure to cloud data warehouses or analytics platforms
(Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks)

BENEFITS

Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance (100%
coverage for employee; 80% for dependents)

401(k) matching up to 4% of salary

$5,000 annual professional development budget for
courses, conferences, or certifications

Flexible work arrangement with option to work remote or
from our SF office

Unlimited paid time off (with a minimum of 20 days
encouraged)

Collaborative, flat organizational structure with opportunities
to lead high-impact projects

APPLY

Interested candidates should submit a resume, a brief cover

letter, and a GitHub profile or portfolio link showcasing recent
data science projects to careers@vertexanalytics.com. Please
include 'Mid Data Scientist' in the email subject line. We review
applications on a rolling basis and will contact qualified
candidates within 5 business days.
